step_plan.current_step: Step 1: PM Phase — README.md smoke test + GitHub CI gate

strict_mode_status.basis: Last 3 META-FS-PD records: 100, 100, 100 (BUG-20260509-6A4F, BUG-20260509-ED9C, BUG-20260509-894D) — all three 100%, threshold met

contract_v2.oracle_waiver: docs-only: README.md markdown creation, no runnable code

step_plan.interface_spec: - Input: None (README.md does not exist yet — new file) - Output: README.md (new file, markdown, contains "Pipeline smoke test" section) - Validation: file exists at repo root; section heading "Pipeline smoke test" present
step_plan.requirements: 1. Create README.md at repository root (C:\Users\hojiy\OneDrive\Desktop\Projects\Really good agents for QA and Orchestra\README.md) 2. Include a "## Pipeline smoke test" section (H2 markdown heading exactly) 3. Section must describe: this pipeline verifies end-to-end workflow (PM → Dev → QA → SEC skip → Build N/A → Three-Gate → Architect) 4. Include pipeline_id IMP-20260509-A4DB in the section 5. Git: create new branch named "smoke-test/IMP-20260509-A4DB" from main 6. Commit README.md to that branch 7. Push branch to origin (remote: https://github.com/hojiyong2-commits/Pipeline.git) 8. Create PR titled "[IMP-20260509-A4DB] Add Pipeline smoke test section to README" 9. Do NOT push directly to main 10. docs-only task — no Python code changes

micro_task.change_summary: Create README.md with Pipeline smoke test section (H2 + description)
Create branch smoke-test/IMP-20260509-A4DB, commit README.md, push, open PR via gh CLI

decomposition_audit.split_decision: docs-only task: 1 new file + 1 git operation. No function changes. Split into MT-1 (content) and MT-2 (git/PR) for clarity. Under 100 lines, under 3 files — SINGLE_TASK_OK but split for auditability.

step_plan.python_version: N/A — docs-only task, no Python code

phase_flow.phase: Dev: create README.md + git branch + commit + push + PR
QA: verify README.md content, PR exists, branch name correct
SEC: skip (no network code, no DB)
Build: N/A — docs-only, skip-reason="docs-only", user-confirmed required

Three-Gate: 1. python pipeline.py gates technical (relaxed-tools for docs-only) 2. python pipeline.py gates github-ci --user-confirmed (after CI PASS) 3. python pipeline.py gates accept --result ACCEPT --user-confirmed

step_plan.acceptance_criteria: 1. README.md exists at repository root 2. Contains H2 section "## Pipeline smoke test" (exact heading) 3. Section references pipeline_id IMP-20260509-A4DB 4. Branch smoke-test/IMP-20260509-A4DB exists on origin remote 5. PR titled "[IMP-20260509-A4DB] Add Pipeline smoke test section to README" is open 6. No direct push to main branch 7. GitHub CI (pytest + attestation) passes on the PR 8. pipeline_attestation.json artifact uploaded by CI 9. Edge: section heading must be exact H2 markdown (## not # or ###) 10. Edge: README.md must not be empty (min 10 lines) 11. strict_mode checks: no dead code, no duplication, all consumers synced 12. [Anti-gaming: no MD modification without actual file edit verified by QA via Grep] 13. [Anti-gaming: harness score/percentage must be int type, not float or null] 14. [Anti-gaming: validate_test_evidence must use runner-owned JSON channel, not stdout marker]
step_plan.forbidden: 1. Direct push to main branch — must use PR workflow 2. Any Python code changes — docs-only task 3. Modification of pipeline.py, CLAUDE.md, or agent MD files 4. Using float or null for harness score/percentage fields 5. stdout marker-based test evidence (must use runner-owned JSON channel) 6. Single-location whitelist modification without checking all locations (patterns 8, 9) 7. Faking CI attestation or PR existence 8. Harness scoring without actual code/file submission (evidence gate)

handover_template.description: Dev agent must output this handover XML after completing work

target_files.file: C:\Users\hojiy\OneDrive\Desktop\Projects\Really good agents for QA and Orchestra\README.md

context_injection.phase_rules_excerpt: Phase 2 Dev: docs-only task, create README.md with Pipeline smoke test section. Phase 4 QA: verify README content and git/PR state. Phase 5 SEC: skip (no network/DB code). Phase 6 Build: N/A docs-only, user confirmation required before Phase 7. Phase 7 Three-Gate: gates technical + gates github-ci --user-confirmed + gates accept --user-confirmed. Phase 8 Architect: architect --report-file architect_report.xml. Anti-gaming: score/percentage must be int. No stdout marker evidence. No direct main push.
context_injection.prev_phase_summary: Phase 1 PM complete. Contract v2 Three-Gate frozen. step_plan.xml written.

strict_mode_for_harness.additional_penalties: dead_code: -1pt/instance max -5pt; duplication: -1pt/instance max -5pt; producer_consumer_completeness: -2pt/missing consumer
